description_long: A deep, matte black bowl is filled with a vibrant serving of ramen, featuring a rich orange broth with visible swirls of oil and floating toppings. The bowl contains a halved soft-boiled egg, slices of meat, and green garnishes, all arranged artfully on the surface. A pair of black chopsticks rests across the top of the bowl, with one end dipping into the noodles and broth. The bowl's exterior is smooth and unadorned, emphasizing its modern, minimalist design. The ramen toppings are grouped to one side, creating a visually appealing contrast with the broth. The overall presentation is inviting and typical of a high-quality ramen dish found in urban eateries.
description: A matte black bowl of ramen with orange broth, artfully arranged toppings, and black chopsticks resting across the top. The presentation is modern and visually appealing.
description_view_0: The bowl is seen from a side angle, highlighting the chopsticks resting across the top and the vibrant orange broth with visible toppings.
description_view_1: A nearly top-down view shows the chopsticks standing upright and the arrangement of toppings, including the egg and meat slices, more clearly.
description_view_2: This side view emphasizes the length of the chopsticks and the smooth, rounded shape of the bowl, with toppings partially visible.
description_view_3: A rear angle reveals the chopsticks crossing above the bowl and the grouping of toppings, with the egg and meat slices most visible.
attribute_bowl_design: The bowl is deep and rounded with a smooth, matte black ceramic finish. Its rim is slightly thick and unadorned, giving it a minimalist, modern appearance. There are no visible patterns or decorative elements on the exterior.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Toppings are grouped to one side of the bowl, with a halved egg, slices of meat, and green garnishes arranged in a visually balanced manner. The toppings float on the surface of the broth, creating a layered and inviting presentation.
attribute_noodle_visibility: The noodles are mostly submerged beneath the broth and toppings, with only a few strands visible near the chopsticks. They are not prominently displayed above the surface.
attribute_broth_clarity: The broth appears opaque and richly colored, with visible swirls of oil and some floating particles. It is not clear or translucent.
attribute_utensil_presence: A pair of black chopsticks is present, resting across the top of the bowl and partially dipping into the ramen. The chopsticks appear to be made of wood or plastic.
